name: 5'x7' Wellsville Handloom Flatweave Stripe Rug Gray - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Indoor 5x7 Area Rug
description:
Complement your modern or contemporary home decor with this Wellsville Handloom Flatweave Striped Rug from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring a striped pattern in gray tones, this rectangle rug with flat pile lends a minimalistic touch to your space. Easy to fit in any room in your home, this handmade rug helps you add artistic appeal to your decor.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere. Adheres to Goodweave sustainabilty norms
